microui.component
 

  • Uses of Button in microui.component

    Subclasses of Button in microui.component
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    MenuButton
    A hierarchical menu button component that can contain both plain items and sub-menus.
    Methods in microui.component that return Button
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Button
    MenuButton.find(String title)
    Finds a button by its title, searching recursively through sub-menus.
    Button
    MenuButton.find(String title, boolean recursive)
    Finds a button by its title, optionally searching recursively through sub-menus.
    Button
    MenuButton.findById(int id)
    Finds a button by its ID, searching recursively.
    Button
    MenuButton.findById(int id, boolean recursive)
    Finds a button by its ID, optionally searching recursively.
    Button
    MenuButton.findByTextId(String textId)
    Finds a button by its text ID, searching recursively.
    Button
    MenuButton.findByTextId(String textId, boolean recursive)
    Finds a button by its text ID, optionally searching recursively.
    Button
    MenuButton.get(String title)
    Gets a button by its title, searching recursively.
    Button
    MenuButton.get(String title, boolean recursive)
    Gets a button by its title, optionally searching recursively.
    Button
    MenuButton.getById(int id)
    Gets a button by its ID, searching recursively.
    Button
    MenuButton.getById(int id, boolean recursive)
    Gets a button by its ID, optionally searching recursively.
    Button
    MenuButton.getByTextId(String textId)
    Gets a button by its text ID, searching recursively.
    Button
    MenuButton.getByTextId(String textId, boolean recursive)
    Gets a button by its text ID, optionally searching recursively.
    final Button
    Button.setFont(processing.core.PFont font)
    Sets the font for rendering the button's text.
    final Button
    Button.setImage(processing.core.PImage image)
    Sets an image to display on the button.
    final Button
    Button.setImageColor(AbstractColor color)
    Sets the tint color to apply to the button's image.
    final Button
    Button.setText(String text)
    Sets the text to display on the button.
    final Button
    Button.setTextAlignX(int alignX)
    Sets the horizontal alignment of the button's text.
    final Button
    Button.setTextAlignY(int alignY)
    Sets the vertical alignment of the button's text.
    final Button
    Button.setTextColor(AbstractColor color)
    Sets the color of the button's text.
    final Button
    Button.setTextVisible(boolean isVisible)
    Sets the visibility of the button's text.
